reviews.review_description:
It is a nice fun game to play with nice music and I liked it. Movement is a bit annoying but you can enjoy it after a little practice.

Suggestion: Kindly change movement by button into swipe left and swipe right. It is a bit annoying to press button each time we need to switch car path while it always in movement regardless of straight path.

This game has the worst type of control I have ever seen. You don't get to control the car by moving or tilting your head, which is the obvious choice for Gear VR because it's intuitive. You don't get to use a game controller either, which would have been also acceptable. A third implementation - which I have never seen but I suppose would work - would be to swipe forward and aft to steer right and left respectively.

Instead the developers decided it would be "fun" to have the car go crazy from side to side and each time you tap the side pad on Gear VR it changes direction. "Brilliant" idea...
The game controls are awful which a sham of a game
Controls were not explained. After I figured out by tapping button you are still not in control of the vehicle, it sort of bounces left and right still. One star. Because I enjoyed thre cartoony art.

The game works a bit like flappy bird i.e. keep pressing the touchpad button to change the van direction. 
Developer: Would be nice to have a hint on how to control the van
Otherwise not a bad game when you figure it out.
Total crap no control at all, a waste of download time
